name: Multiverse Wrestling Championship - Equestria
description:
A wrestling-themed game where you take on MLP characters and claim them as your wives/harem members. Defeat them, and bring them back to your locker room for smut. Each character has their own theme, gear, and abilities in-ring!

Contains mild violence, wrestling moves, injuries, bruises, blood etc.

This template can be applied to other, non-My Little Pony series too! Please leave a comment if you have a request/idea. I am actively tweaking and working on this to try and make it as accurate and usable as possible, so constructive comments are very helpful.

MUST-DOS

  • Use the chat memory function (found in the options) to keep track of your harem and other important plot points. The model will forget if you don't.

    SUGGESTIONS

  • Put an ending point on your responses to keep the bot from speaking for you/skipping ahead - no amount of personality prompting can stop this with vague replies. You can also delete segments or lower generation sizes to try and make it behave. I know it can be a pain in the butt.

  • Create a persona which has a description appropriate for a wrestling-themed experience, have some fun with it, describe your gear etc.

  • Allow the opponent to get some offence against you to extend the match, you can end them very quickly if you push the advantage too much.

  • Add some description to your moves so that the AI can parse them properly, sometimes it won't understand if you only give it a name.

    CHANGELOG
    14/07/24: Mane Six added
    15/07/24: Celestia and Luna added
creator: alcrowholic
